title: Citation to legal representative of multiple defendants
doc_html:
Art. 1203.  Citation to legal representative of multiple defendants

When one person is the legal representative of several persons made defendant in the same cause, only one citation need be addressed to such representative.
doc_text:
Art. 1203.  Citation to legal representative of multiple defendants
When one person is the legal representative of several persons made defendant in the same cause, only one citation need be addressed to such representative.
